title: podocarpus laminaris
intro: Podocarpus laminaris, also known as the Yellow Kauri or Dillenia, is a species of coniferous tree native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Podocarpus laminaris include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
